description_long: This is a large, modern school complex enclosed by a rectangular fence, featuring multiple interconnected brick and concrete buildings with flat roofs. The campus includes a main entrance with a driveway, a spacious parking area, and landscaped green spaces with trees and shrubs. Outdoor amenities are visible, such as a tennis court, a playground area with equipment, and shaded seating or gathering zones. The layout is organized with clear pathways, open courtyards, and a mix of paved and natural surfaces. The buildings are primarily low-rise, with some sections appearing to be two stories, and the overall design emphasizes accessibility and open space. The architectural style is contemporary, with clean lines, functional forms, and a focus on outdoor activity areas.
description: A modern, multi-building school complex with sports courts, playground, landscaped grounds, and a secure perimeter fence. The design features flat-roofed brick structures, open courtyards, and various outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: From this view, the main entrance driveway, front gate, and a large portion of the landscaped perimeter are visible, with the school buildings set further back.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the parking area, tennis court, and playground, as well as the arrangement of the main school buildings and outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: Here, the tennis court and a large open courtyard are prominent, with the rear of the school buildings and additional outdoor seating or gathering areas visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the back of the complex, including the playground, shaded seating, and the rear access to the school buildings, with the driveway and entrance on the far side.
